metadata.description: Bryan's personal Claude Code plugins and skills.

plugins.name: ralph
plugins.description: Install and run the Ralph Wiggum agentic loop (claude/codex) in any project. Adds ralph/once.sh + ralph/afk.sh, package.json scripts, and the prompt/state-file scaffolding.

plugins.name: manual-chrome-review
plugins.description: Verify a running web app in a real Chrome session by combining user-driven keyboard/mouse input with Claude-driven DOM, network, WebSocket, and server-side inspection. Triggers on 'manual chrome review', 'verify in browser', 'manually test feature', 'live browser session', 'walk through my app in chrome', 'review the new feature'.
